content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit is imported and an HMHomeManager instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift (App/WallpaperGridView.swift:2,5) but the view only shows a wallpaper category list, with no home-automation UI or accessory features anywhere in the app.
Pierre: Apple requires apps using HomeKit to provide genuine home-automation functionality, not just link the framework incidentally — an unused HMHomeManager in a wallpaper app is a classic 4.5.x/2.5.x rejection pattern and may also trigger a HomeKit usage-description prompt with no matching feature. Please verify whether HomeKit is actually needed here; if not, remove the import, the HMHomeManager instantiation, and the associated entitlement/Info.plist usage description to avoid review questions.
